chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1780 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General along with Inspector Ayaz Hussain I.O PS Nousharo Feroze..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, same is taken on reocrd. Comments have been filed on behalf of SSP Nousharo Feroze/ respondent No.3, same is taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The investigation officer is present in Court and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 Cr.P.C,, wherein she has not supported contents of FIR and has stated that she was not abducted and she contracted marriage of her own free will with petitioner No.2. He further submits that, in view of the said statement, the case is liable to be disposed of under “C” class. Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo objected the petition. After such a statement, learned counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, instant constitution petition, stands disposed of with directions to the I.O to submit the report, as suggested by him, before the concerned Magistrate within fifteen days. In the meantime, official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. In view of the above, petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
